## Iteration 1
- Started: 2025-01-15T10:30:00+00:00
- Story: Basic first-page pagination
- Implemented PaginationResult interface and basic paginate function
- Key learning: Empty dataset must return { data: [], nextCursor: null, hasMore: false } — not throw
- Cursor format: Base64-encoded item ID using Buffer.from(id).toString('base64')
- Tests passing: 1/7
- Finished: 2025-01-15T10:32:14+00:00

## Iteration 2
- Started: 2025-01-15T10:32:16+00:00
- Story: Cursor-based continuation
- Added cursor decoding logic: Buffer.from(cursor, 'base64').toString()
- Gotcha: findIndex returns -1 if cursor points to deleted item — fall back to startIndex 0
- Tests passing: 3/7 (stories 1-3 all passed once cursor logic worked)
- Finished: 2025-01-15T10:34:45+00:00
